use_cases: Displaying product features on SaaS landing pages with animated carousel transitions
Showcasing service benefits with images and icons in a rotating showcase
Presenting company values or differentiators in an interactive format
Creating engaging product tours for mobile apps or web platforms
Highlighting key capabilities in a visually appealing feature grid
ai_summary: A feature carousel component built with React and Framer Motion that displays product features with images, icons, and descriptions in an animated rotating showcase. Features smooth transition animations, navigation controls, and responsive design optimized for showcasing key product benefits or service features on landing pages and marketing sites.
